content.headline: Sleep Begins Before Bed
content.body: Your sleep quality is determined by your environment. Today is about optimizing your bedroom for rest.

content.headline: Darkness and Coolness
content.body: Ensure your room is as dark as possible. Aim for a slightly cooler temperature (around 18-20°C) for optimal sleep.

missions.title: Remove electronics
missions.description: Take phone and laptop out of the bedroom.

missions.title: Set room temperature
missions.description: Cool down the room before bed.
